message:
fix(abi): replace eprintln! with direct sys_write_fd in ABI error paths

Replace eprintln! calls in psiginfo (signal_abi), __assert_fail and
__assert_perror_fail (stdlib_abi), and fmtmsg (unistd_abi) with
direct sys_write_fd(STDERR_FILENO, ...) calls.

eprintln! routes through Rust's stdio machinery which may re-enter
glibc — dangerous in ABI entrypoints that may be called during
abnormal program state (assertions, signals). Direct fd writes avoid
the re-entrancy hazard entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
